item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-028","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答按组织责任直接判断：市场部主导转化与传播表达，产品部负责准确性把关，并给出清晰结论“市场部主导，产品部把关”。没有套用 agentic/control-boundary/WAE 式框架或术语，符合 negative_control 的 stay-asleep 期望。"}
